name: qa-toolkit
description: A complete QA toolkit for analyzing user stories, generating test cases, assessing risk, and exploring live applications. Covers the full manual testing workflow from story refinement to test execution prioritization — including an autonomous QA Orchestrator agent that chains the full pipeline end-to-end.

agents.name: qa-orchestrator
agents.description: Autonomous end-to-end QA pipeline: analyze story → generate test cases → assess risk → generate Playwright tests.
